description:
A multithread-enabled quickstart tool for AmpliconArchitect. Performs all preliminary steps (alignment, CNV calling, seed interval detection) required prior to running AmpliconArchitect. PrepareAA supports hg19 (or GRCh37), hg38 as well as mouse genome mm10 (or GRCm38). PrepareAA can also be invoked to start at intermediate stages of the data preparation process.
All credits go to\: https\://github.com/AmpliconSuite/AmpliconSuite-pipeline
View licenses here\: https\://github.com/genepattern/AmpliconSuite\#licenses

To increase your GenePattern disk space quote so you can more easily upload the input bam files, click here to join the AmpliconSuiteUsers group on this server.

To run multiple samples at once, simply drag and drop multiple samples into the input options. There is no need to check the "Batch" box.
Currently using Amplicon Suite version 1.3.8.
author: Edwin Huang;Mesirov Lab
plan:
## AmpliconSuite GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan ### 1. Overview AmpliconSuite is a GenePattern module that A multithread-enabled quickstart tool for AmpliconArchitect. Performs all preliminary steps (alignment, CNV calling, seed interval detection) required prior to running AmpliconArchitect. PrepareAA supports hg19 (or GRCh37), hg38 as well as mouse genome mm10 (or GRCm38). PrepareAA can also be invoked to start at intermediate stages of the data preparation process.\n
\nAll credits go to\: https\://github.com/AmpliconSuite/AmpliconSuite-pipeline \n
\nView licenses here\: https\://github.com/genepattern/AmpliconSuite\#licenses\n
\n

\nTo increase your GenePattern disk space quote so you can more easily upload the input bam files, click here to join the AmpliconSuiteUsers group on this server.

\n \nTo run multiple samples at once, simply drag and drop multiple samples into the input options. There is no need to check the "Batch" box. \n\n
\nCurrently using Amplicon Suite version 1.3.8. ### 2. Parameters The module exposes 35 parameters: - Required: Sample.Name, RUN.AA, RUN.AC, reference, AA.std.of.insert.size, upload.server - Optional: bam.file, fastq.r1, fastq.r2, cnvkit.segmentation, project.key, cnv.bed, AA.seed, normal_bam, VCF.file, VCF.no.filter, CN.gain, Minimum.copy.number.size, Downsample.Argument, AA.runmode, AA.extend.mode, no.filter, skip.QC, ploidy, purity, sample_metadata, sample_type, sample_source, tissue_of_origin, sample_description, AA_zipped_output, foldback.pair.support.min, upload.to.amplicon.repository, amplicon.repository.username, project.id ### 3. Command Line ``` python3 /opt/genepatt/run_aa.py --n_threads --reference --file_prefix --RUN_AA --RUN_AC --mosek_server_license ``` ### 4. Docker Image Docker image: genepattern/amplicon-architect\:v3.13.0 ### 5. Validation Strategy - Validate all required parameters are provided - Validate file formats match expected extensions - Check parameter value ranges where applicable ### 6. Implementation Roadmap Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation Phase 2: Docker container setup Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: bam.file
parameters.description: Please provide the BAM file. There should only be one of a single bam file, 2 fastqs or a single zipped output from a previous run.

parameters.name: fastq.r1
parameters.description: First FASTQ file. There should only be one of a single bam file, 2 fastqs or a single zipped output from a previous run.

parameters.name: fastq.r2
parameters.description: Second FASTQ file. There should only be one of a single bam file, 2 fastqs or a single zipped output from a previous run.

parameters.name: Sample.Name
parameters.description: Name of the sample being run. Also used as the output prefix.

parameters.name: RUN.AA
parameters.description: Would you like to run AA at the end? Will return AA results at the end if Yes. If no, will return files necessary to input to AA. Default to "Yes", user can select "No".

parameters.name: RUN.AC
parameters.description: Whether or not to run Amplicon Classifier. Default to "Yes", user can select "No".

parameters.name: reference
parameters.description: Reference genome. Please use drop down to select.

parameters.name: cnvkit.segmentation
parameters.description: Segmentation method for CNVKit (if used), defaults to CNVKit default segmentation method (cbs). Use drop down menu to select.

parameters.name: project.key
parameters.description: Project key on ampliconrepository.org, found under the key icon on the project page for project owners.

parameters.name: cnv.bed
parameters.description: BED file (or CNVKit .cns file) of CNV changes. Fields in the bed file should be\: chr start end name cngain

parameters.name: AA.seed
parameters.description: The seed that sets randomness for Amplicon Architect

parameters.name: normal_bam
parameters.description: Path to a matched normal bam for CNVKit (optional).

parameters.name: VCF.file
parameters.description: Provide a VCF file of externally-called SVs to augment SVs identified by AA internally.

parameters.name: VCF.no.filter
parameters.description: Use all external SV calls from the VCF file, even those without 'PASS' in the FILTER column.

parameters.name: CN.gain
parameters.description: Copy number gain threshold to consider for AA seeding.

parameters.name: Minimum.copy.number.size
parameters.description: CN interval size (in bp) to consider for AA seeding

parameters.name: Downsample.Argument
parameters.description: Set a custom threshold for bam coverage downsampling during AA. Does not affect coverage in analyses outside of AA.

parameters.name: AA.runmode
parameters.description: If --run_AA selected, set the --runmode argument to AA. Refer to AA documentation\: https\://github.com/AmpliconSuite/AmpliconArchitect\#optional-arguments.  Default mode is FULL.

parameters.name: AA.extend.mode
parameters.description: If running Amplicon Architect, set extendmode for AA. Refer to AA documentation\: https\://github.com/AmpliconSuite/AmpliconArchitect\#optional-arguments Default is EXPLORE.

parameters.name: AA.std.of.insert.size
parameters.description: Number of standard deviations around the insert size. May need to increase for sequencing runs with high variance after insert size selection step. Default is 3.0

parameters.name: no.filter
parameters.description: Do not run amplified_intervals.py to identify amplified seeds. Default \= No

parameters.name: skip.QC
parameters.description: Skip QC on the BAM file. Do not adjust AA insert_sdevs for poor-quality insert size distribution. Default \= No.

parameters.name: ploidy
parameters.description:
**NOT RECOMMENDED TO SET unless required**
Specify a ploidy estimate of the genome for CNVKit. Not used by AA itself.

parameters.name: purity
parameters.description:
**NOT RECOMMENDED TO SET unless required**
\nSpecify a tumor purity estimate for CNVKit. Not used by AA itself. Note that specifying low purity may lead to many high copy number seed regions after rescaling is applied consider setting a higher --cn_gain threshold for low purity samples undergoing correction.

parameters.name: sample_metadata
parameters.description: A .json file containing metadata information. Example metadata json\: here

parameters.name: AA_zipped_output
parameters.description: Output directly from Amplicon Architect. should be a zipped file, containing AA_results. There should only be one of a single bam file, 2 fastqs or a single zipped output from a previous run.

parameters.name: foldback.pair.support.min
parameters.description: Minimum number of read-pairs required to support foldback-type SVs

parameters.name: upload.to.amplicon.repository
parameters.description: Upload to ampliconrepository.org, appending to the specified project

parameters.name: amplicon.repository.username
parameters.description: Username or email used for your ampliconrepository.org account

parameters.name: project.id
parameters.description: Project uuid on ampliconrepository.org, found under the key icon on the project page for project owners.

parameters.name: upload.server
parameters.description: Developer only argument for which server to upload to. Allowed calues are prod, dev and local
